rating.title: Rate your answer

modeMenu.title: Choose your mode
modeMenu.description: Choose how this study session should be structured.

all.title: All Cards
all.description: Study all cards in the study set.

random.title: Random
random.description: Study all cards in a random order.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Study only cards marked as favorites.

wrongOnly.title: Wrong Answers Only
wrongOnly.description: Study only cards that were answered incorrectly last time.

newOnly.title: New Cards Only
newOnly.description: Study only cards that have never been answered.

dueOnly.title: Due Cards Only
dueOnly.description: Study only cards whose next review is currently due.

favoritesDue.title: Favorites + Due
favoritesDue.description: Study only favorite cards whose review is currently due.

marathon.title: Marathon Mode
marathon.description: Study all available cards without a session limit.

lightning.title: Lightning Mode
lightning.description: You have only five seconds for each card.

exam.title: Exam Mode
exam.description: No immediate feedback. Your result is shown at the end.

STREAK_365.title: Year of Learning
STREAK_365.description: Study for an entire year without interruption.

STUDY_TIME_15.title: Quarter Hour
STUDY_TIME_15.description: Study at least 15 minutes in one week.

STUDY_TIME_30.title: Focused Half Hour
STUDY_TIME_30.description: Study at least 30 minutes in one week.

SPEED_RUN.title: Speed Run
SPEED_RUN.description: Accumulate at least 60 study minutes in one week.

STUDY_TIME_120.title: Deep Focus
STUDY_TIME_120.description: Study at least two hours in one week.

STUDY_TIME_300.title: Five-Hour Week
STUDY_TIME_300.description: Study at least five hours in one week.

STUDY_TIME_600.title: Study Marathon
STUDY_TIME_600.description: Study at least ten hours in one week.
